title: HIKI: The Unseen Horror
description: HIKI: The Unseen Horror - This mod adds new mobs and events
body:
There was a story about a mysterious entity that came to a house. The house had four rooms, red dust, and flickering lights…

This mod introduces a terrifying entity called Hiki, which brings horror and unsettling events into your world.

Hiki has four phases:


Phase One:
> The player starts in a relatively safe environment but will notice strange occurrences.
> Messages such as "Don't do it" or "Kill yourself" may appear.
> Time will randomly shift between day and night.
> Mysterious potion effects will sometimes manifest in the sky.

2. Phase Two:

> The world becomes more unpredictable and disturbing.
> Doors may open by themselves.
> A Pigman may suddenly approach and attack.
> Creepy ambient sounds play, including the eerie chimes of amethyst.

3. Phase Three:

> The true nightmare begins—Hiki becomes relentless.
> Every 50 seconds, the player is forcefully teleported back to Hiki's house.
> Strange entities, including fast-moving Pigmen, will flicker in and out of existence.
> The sounds of amethyst crystals will echo constantly.

4. Phase Four:

> The player is trapped in the house , with no escape.
> A Pigman, Mimic, Hiki, may appear
> Hiki manipulates time, shifting between day and night at will.

After sleeping, the most disturbing sounds will fill the air.

Many more horrors await—download the mod and uncover the rest… 

Good luck!
